Bob Blackman CBE MP

Serving the people of Harrow East

I'm Bob Blackman and I've been elected to be your MP for Harrow East since 2010. It's a great honour to represent such an amazing and diverse community. I'm here to help, regardless of how you voted, so please get in touch.

CLICK HERE to find ways for you to get involved and have your say!

Read all news stories

INVESTMENT: £22.6 million upgrade to Northwick Park Hospital

I am delighted that London North West University Healthcare NHS Trust is receiving £22.62 million which will be used for a new ward with 32 beds at Northwick Park Hospital. This comes after I successfully pressed the Government for earlier support to improve Northwick Park's Accident & Emergency Department.

CLICK HERE to find out more.
